CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2026 Continued To Aug-12-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Continued To Jun-25-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOSEPH NAUMANN AN INDIVIDUAL, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL PERSONS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

Plaintiff Joseph Naumann's Motion for Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And PAGA Settlement is CONTINUED TO JUNE 25, 2026, AND FURTHER EVIDENCE AND BRIEFING IS ORDERED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Moving Party must prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing. Moving Parties must promptly serve notice of the executed order on all parties entitled to notice.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
